subtitle: Marie absent all week; Ivanti incident active; Access case 68974493 timeline pending
context: Marie Cooksey is on leave until Monday 15 June and has sent a handover covering H&S support queue and OSM escalations, which Chris is covering alongside her. The Major Incident involving an Ivanti security vulnerability in OSM Self-Service requires immediate action - Sarah Warne is coordinating with a Senior Support Engineer and needs testing support from Rob and Asta on the PeopleXD service requests interface. Access Support case 68974493 (Chemistry bulk-delete request) is blocked waiting for a timeline from Access Group before they can proceed; Julie Hickman flagged this at 13:29 on 8 June. The Cority employee import error from 5 June on the OxfordUniversity_Demo system needs investigation. DTP1092 College Staff in PXD project has pending comments and approvals from Marie that cannot progress until she returns on 15 June. Open the Access case email from Julie Hickman first - it contains the blocking dependency for a live support issue.

urgent.title: Major Incident - Ivanti Security Vulnerability
urgent.sub: OSM Self-Service issue. Sarah Warne coordinating with Senior Support Engineer. Rob and Asta assigned to test PeopleXD service requests interface. Action required today.
urgent.subject: RE: Major Incident - Priority 1 Support Call# TBC - a Security vulnerability with Ivanti.

urgent.title: Access Case 68974493 - Timeline Required
urgent.sub: Chemistry bulk-delete request blocked. Julie Hickman requesting timeline from Access Group (AG) before proceeding. Kevin's reply sent 14:52 on 8 June confirms AG ready but need two items from us first. Follow up with Julie on status.
urgent.subject: RE: Access Support Team | 68974493 - New Case
